summary: Possible accessibility barriers found on the Level Access contact page

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Multiple images may be missing alternative text, potentially causing issues for users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on assistive technologies may not be able to understand the content or purpose of these images, potentially hindering their ability to navigate or understand the page
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: 64 instances of missing image alt text were detected

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some text elements may have low contrast, potentially causing issues for users with visual impairments
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may have difficulty reading or distinguishing between different text elements, potentially hindering their ability to understand the content
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: 16 instances of low contrast text were detected

ai_suggested_observations.observation: The page may not be fully accessible when zoomed in or when using a keyboard for navigation
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on assistive technologies or have visual impairments may experience issues when trying to navigate or access content on the page
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: 3 instances of zoom fixed width content were detected, and 1 instance of missing focus indicator was detected

outreach_notes: We would appreciate the opportunity to discuss our findings and provide recommendations for improving the accessibility of the Level Access contact page
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
